channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Excessive cholesterol in astrocytes linked to cognitive decline in Alzheimer's mice
item.description: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative disorder that leads to progressive memory loss and a decline in mental functions. Several past studies...

item.title: Digital health literacy higher in lower-income countries, 30-country survey finds
item.description: A cross-national survey of 31,000 adults in 30 countries finds that digital health literacy is highest in low- and middle-income countries and lowest ...

item.title: Research uncovers fatal delays in EpiPen treatment for food anaphylaxis in children
item.description: Fatal delays in administering life-saving adrenaline autoinjector (EpiPen) for food anaphylaxis, a severe and rapid allergic reaction, are highlighted...

item.title: RHR: The Sleep Optimization Trap: Are You Tracking Yourself Into Worse Sleep?
item.description: In this episode of Revolution Health Radio, Chris Kresser explores the growing phenomenon of orthosomnia, a condition driven by the obsessive pursuit ...
